email_opening: I have followed your work at Marshall Goldsmith Stakeholder Centered Coaching and your focus on leaders moving from CEO scope into board and enterprise mandates.
email_body_core:
Hi Marshall,

I have been following your work at Marshall Goldsmith Stakeholder Centered Coaching, and I thought this might be useful for the executives you support.

Starting Monday gives executive coaches a hard-edged execution layer: company targeting, interview narrative discipline, and outreach workflows that hold up under pressure.

For CEO-to-Board clients at Marshall Goldsmith Stakeholder Centered Coaching, the failure mode is simple: they look accomplished, then lose momentum because governance and board-fit are not explicit in the first two conversations.

The concrete proof point is a board narrative that can be explained in one minute without hand-waving.

If useful, I can send the board-readiness interview map so you can see exactly how it changes first-touch conversation quality.

If useful, I can walk you through a 20-minute pilot with 3 success criteria and you can decide quickly if it is worth rolling into your practice.

Rich
startingmonday.app
